title: Merger Consideration: In what scenario would a company most likely use a...
summary: Identify scenarios where a company would most likely use cash as merger consideration.
prompt: In what scenario would a company most likely use a cash transaction in an acquisition?

options.text: Companies with strong cash reserves are more likely to utilize cash
A proxy contest for board control

solution: Companies with strong cash reserves are more likely to utilize cash transactions because it allows for immediate realization of gains and can simplify the acquisition process.
